title: 7-Day Kilimanjaro Machame Route
summary: Classic Machame climb structured for acclimatization, summit success, and clean camp-based routing.
description: A full seven-day Kilimanjaro trekking itinerary using the Machame Route, progressing from rainforest to alpine desert before a summit push to Uhuru Peak and descent through Mweka.

days.title: Machame Gate to Machame Camp
days.summary: Enter the park and trek through montane rainforest to the first camp on the Machame route.

days.title: Machame Camp to Shira Camp
days.summary: Climb out of the forest into moorland terrain with broader views toward the Shira Plateau.

days.title: Shira Camp to Barranco Camp via Lava Tower
days.summary: Use a climb-high, sleep-lower acclimatization day crossing volcanic terrain before descending to Barranco.

days.title: Barranco Camp to Karanga Camp
days.summary: Tackle the Barranco Wall and continue through dramatic high-altitude scenery to Karanga.

days.title: Karanga Camp to Barafu Camp
days.summary: Move steadily higher to Barafu, rest, and prepare for the overnight summit push.

days.title: Barafu Camp to Uhuru Peak and down to Mweka Camp
days.summary: Begin before dawn for the summit attempt, reach Uhuru Peak, then descend to lower camp for recovery.

days.title: Mweka Camp to Mweka Gate and departure
days.summary: Complete the descent through forest, collect exit formalities, and transfer onward after the climb.
